nasb.text: So the priest shall make atonement for him concerning his sin which he has committed from one of these, and it will be forgiven him; then the rest shall become the priest’s, like the grain offering.’ ”

esv.text: Thus the priest shall make atonement for him for the sin which he has committed in any one of these things, and he shall be forgiven. And the remainder shall be for the priest, as in the grain offering.”

cnv.text: 祭司為他所犯的任何一樣罪贖罪，他就蒙赦免。其餘的祭物要歸給祭司，好像素祭一樣。”

ccb.text: 这样，祭司为他赎了罪，他就会得到赦免。剩下的细面粉要归祭司，像献素祭一样。”
